	nop
	inc @R1
	inc 03h
	ljmp jump_3FFF

	nop
	inc @R1
	inc 81h
	ljmp jump_3FFF

	ajmp jump_1007

	inc 82h
	ljmp jump_3FFF

; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	120Dh
jump_120D:
	nop

org	120Eh
	ajmp jump_1007


org	1210h
	inc 83h

org	1212h
	ljmp jump_3FFF


org	1215h
	ajmp jump_1007


org	1217h
	inc 84h

org	1219h
	ljmp jump_3FFF


org	121Ch
	ajmp fwd_1004_jump_F08F


org	121Eh
	rr A

org	121Fh
	inc R1

org	1220h
	inc A

org	1221h
	jbc 20h.3, jump_126F

org	1224h
	nop

org	1225h
	xrl A, 00h

org	1227h
	mov R1, #00h	;   0

org	1229h
	jmp @A + DPTR


org	122Ah
	nop

org	122Bh
	nop

org	122Ch
	nop

org	122Dh
	nop

org	122Eh
	inc R7

org	122Fh
	xch A, @R0

org	1230h
	nop

org	1231h
	dec @R1

org	1232h
	nop

org	1233h
	jnz fwd_1235_jump_1300
fwd_1235_jump_1300:
	ajmp jump_1300

	xrl A, R6
	nop
	inc R6
	rr A
	anl 00h, #65h	; 101 'e'
	nop
	orl C, 20h.0
	xrl A, R1
	nop
	ajmp jump_1300

	xrl A, R4
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop
	nop

end
